'''√l-ch-b''' ('''kalachab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:machinize|machinize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ch-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:machinize|machinize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √l-ch-b
|-
! Lemma
| kalachab
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thilachab || jilachab || shilachab || kilachab
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthulachab || jujulachab || shushulachab || kukulachab
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thulachab || julachab || shulachab || kulachab
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thulachab || julachab || shulachab || kulachab
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thelachab || jelachab || shelachab || kelachab
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thotholachab || jojolachab || shosholachab || kokolachab
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || tholachab || jolachab || sholachab || kolachab
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || tholachab || jolachab || sholachab || kolachab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || lachab || lachab || lachab || lachab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || lachab || lachab || lachab || lachab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || lachab || lachab || lachab || lachab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || lachab || lachab || lachab || lachab
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thælachab || jælachab || shælachab || kælachab
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathalachab || jajalachab || shashalachab || kakalachab
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thalachab || jalachab || shalachab || kalachab
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thalachab || jalachab || shalachab || kalachab
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shalachab
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshalachab
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishalachab
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shalachabnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshalachabnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishalachabnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shalachabshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshalachabnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishalachabshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shalachabro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshalachabnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishalachabro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shalachabmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshalachabnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishalachabmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shalachabsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshalachabnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishalachabsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shalachabng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshalachabnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishalachabng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shalachabya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshalachabnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishalachabya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shalachabyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshalachabnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishalachabyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shalachabnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshalachabnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishalachabnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shalachabnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshalachabnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishalachabnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shalachabnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshalachabnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishalachabnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shalachabshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshalachabnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishalachabshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shalachabshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshalachabnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishalachabshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shalachabshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshalachabnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishalachabshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shalachabronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshalachabnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishalachabronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shalachabroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshalachabnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishalachabroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shalachabromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshalachabnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishalachabromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shalachabmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshalachabnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishalachabmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shalachabmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshalachabnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishalachabmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shalachabmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshalachabnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishalachabmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
